---
title: "最简单梯度下降示例（R + Python）"
author: "你的名字"
date: "2026-02-20"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    fig-align: center
engine: knitr
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(reticulate)
```

# 引言

本示例展示线性回归的最简单梯度下降（Batch GD）。  
目标函数：最小化均方误差（MSE）

$$
\loss(w, b) = \frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n \left( y_i - (w x_i + b) \right)^2
$$

梯度公式：

$$
\frac{\partial \loss}{\partial w} = -\frac{2}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n (y_i - \hat{y}_i) x_i
$$

$$
\frac{\partial \loss}{\partial b} = -\frac{2}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n (y_i - \hat{y}_i)
$$

我们将分别用 **R** 和 **Python** 实现，并比较结果。

# 1. 生成模拟数据（用 R）

```{r}
#| label: data-gen
#| fig-cap: "模拟数据散点图"
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-height: 4

set.seed(123)
n <- 100
x <- runif(n, -2, 2)
true_w <- 3.5
true_b <- 1.2
y <- true_w * x + true_b + rnorm(n, 0, 0.6)

library(ggplot2)
ggplot(data.frame(x = x, y = y), aes(x, y)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_abline(slope = true_w, intercept = true_b, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "模拟数据（真实直线为红色虚线）", x = "x", y = "y") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#| label: r-gd
#| fig-cap: "R 中梯度下降的收敛曲线"
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 5

# 初始化
w <- 0
b <- 0
lr <- 0.05
epochs <- 800
mse_hist <- numeric(epochs)

for (ep in 1:epochs) {
  y_pred <- w * x + b
  error <- y - y_pred
  mse_hist[ep] <- mean(error^2)
  
  dw <- -2 * mean(error * x)
  db <- -2 * mean(error)
  
  w <- w - lr * dw
  b <- b - lr * db
}

# 结果
cat("R 学到的参数：w =", round(w, 3), "b =", round(b, 3), "\n")
cat("真实值：w =", true_w, "b =", true_b, "\n")

# 收敛曲线
df <- data.frame(epoch = 1:epochs, mse = mse_hist)
ggplot(df, aes(epoch, mse)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "R 梯度下降收敛过程", x = "迭代次数", y = "MSE") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{python}
#| label: py-gd
#| fig-cap: "Python 中梯度下降的收敛曲线"

import torch
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# 设置中文字体
# plt.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['SimHei', 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimSun']
plt.rcParams['axes.unicode_minus'] = False  # 解决负号显示问题
plt.rcParams['font.sans-serif'] = ['Arial Unicode MS', 'PingFang SC', 'Heiti SC', 'STHeiti']

# 从 R 环境中获取数据（reticulate 自动桥接）
x_r = r.x
y_r = r.y

X = torch.tensor(x_r, dtype=torch.float32).unsqueeze(1)
Y = torch.tensor(y_r, dtype=torch.float32).unsqueeze(1)

# 初始化参数
w = torch.tensor([0.0], requires_grad=True)
b = torch.tensor([0.0], requires_grad=True)

optimizer = torch.optim.SGD([w, b], lr=0.05)
mse_history = []

for epoch in range(800):
    Y_pred = X @ w + b
    loss = torch.mean((Y - Y_pred)**2)
    mse_history.append(loss.item())
    
    optimizer.zero_grad()
    loss.backward()
    optimizer.step()

# 结果
print(f"Python 学到的参数：w = {w.item():.3f}, b = {b.item():.3f}")

# 画图（matplotlib）
plt.figure(figsize=(7, 5))
plt.plot(range(800), mse_history, color='purple', linewidth=2)
plt.title("Python (PyTorch) 梯度下降收敛过程")
plt.xlabel("Epoch")
plt.ylabel("MSE")
plt.grid(True, alpha=0.3)
plt.show()
```
